series_metadata.series_title: Milk Inspection Fee and Milk Hauler Invoices
series_metadata.series_description: This is an invoice sent by the Dairy Division detailing milk inspection fees and milk hauler fees. Invoices sent back to ODA with payments are kept to research billing disputes.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for 4 years after the year in which the invoices were sent., Paper: Shred
